**Lynda Rae Resnick** (née Harris) is an American entrepreneur born in 1943. She is vice-chairman of The Wonderful Company .

**Stewart Allen Resnick** <sup>[[ 1 ]]()</sup> (born December 24, 1936) is an American billionaire businessman and philanthropist. He is the president and chairman of The Wonderful Company , a privately held company he owns with his wife Lynda Resnick .

title: The Wonderful Company :: Lynda Resnick
excerpts:
Section Title: Lynda Resnick > Vice-Chairman and Co-Owner
Content:
The Wonderful Company
Lynda Resnick is vice-chairman and co-owner of The Wonderful Company, along with her husband, Stewart Resnick, who serves as chairman. The Wonderful Company is a privately held global company committed to providing high-quality, healthy brands and helping improve the lives of the people who live and work in the communities where it operates. Its iconic brands include Wonderful Pistachios & Almonds, Wonderful Halos, Wonderful Seedless Lemons, POM Wonderful, FIJI Water, Teleflora, and JUSTIN, Landmark, and Lewis Cellars wines. Headquartered in Los Angeles, The Wonderful Company has major operations in California’s Central Valley and Fiji.
 ... 
Section Title: Lynda Resnick > Vice-Chairman and Co-Owner
Content:
Most philanthropists write checks... that is the easy part. The hard part is rolling up your sleeves and doing the work to make real change yourself.
Lynda Resnick

title: 11 Inspiring Stories Of Succes ... – The Morning Jolt Podcast – Apple Podcasts
excerpts:
Section Title: 11 Inspiring Stories Of Successful Female Entrepreneurs 2026
Content:
**[03:45] Operational Innovation and Legacy Building**
Peggy Cherng modernizes Panda Express with innovative operational systems like "University of Panda."
Diane Hendricks’ strategic growth of ABC Supply after her husband’s passing. **[04:40] The Oprah Masterclass: Brand Building and Philanthropy**
Oprah’s foundational story: overcoming poverty to systematically build a media empire. Leveraging success for major philanthropic initiatives, especially in education. **[05:35] Ecosystems of Success: Mentorship and Support**
The powerful combination of mentorship and targeted support networks. The role of organizations like the National Association of Women Business Owners (NAWBO). Lynda Resnick (The Wonderful Company) reimagines agricultural product marketing. **[06:40] Local Impact and Diverse Approaches**
Marian Ilitch (Little Caesars) reshaping downtown Detroit through real estate development.
